tests.title: Verify the security disclaimer appears when the chat window is opened
preconditions: The chat feature is enabled for the customer
steps: Click on the chat icon to open the chat window
Observe the interface for a security disclaimer
tests.expected_result: A brief security disclaimer is visible in the chat window.

tests.title: Verify the disclaimer is placed in a highly visible location
steps: Identify the location of the disclaimer relative to the text input box and the message list
tests.expected_result: The message is highly visible and positioned either above the input box or as the first greeting.

tests.title: Verify the disclaimer text contains required financial privacy warnings
preconditions: The chat window is open and disclaimer is visible
steps: Read the content of the disclaimer message
Look for the specific phrases: 'credit card numbers', 'bank details', and 'financial data'
tests.expected_result: The text warns the user not to share credit card numbers, bank details, or other financial data.

tests.title: Verify the disclaimer persists when the chat window is reopened
preconditions: The user has access to the chat
steps: Open the chat window a second time
tests.expected_result: The disclaimer message appears consistently every time the chat window is opened.

notes: The test for placement (AC-2) accepts either position specified in the story.
